expectations.text: New decisions get sequential IDs: D-006 and D-007
expectations.evidence: Step 2 explicitly states: 'new decisions get D-006 and D-007. IDs are zero-padded, always sequential from the highest existing ID.'

expectations.text: Existing decisions D-001 through D-005 are preserved unchanged
expectations.evidence: Step 1 states: 'load all 5 decisions, preserve them exactly as-is. No reordering, no edits to existing entries.' Rules table reinforces: 'Existing D-001–D-005 stay unchanged unless user explicitly replaces one.'

expectations.text: Never reorders or overwrites existing decisions
expectations.evidence: Rules summary table includes 'Never overwrite' and 'Never reorder — Decision order is append-only'. Step 4 confirms: 'Append new decisions — add D-006 and D-007 after D-005.' Merge rule: 'Read → append → write. Never start fresh if the file exists.'

expectations.text: Updates the source_sessions array and updated_at timestamp
expectations.evidence: Step 5 explicitly states: 'bump updated_at to now, append the new transcript filename to source_sessions.'
